data.name: Foresia -The Lust Curse-
data.detailed_description:
STORY


Foresia is a rare High Elf living in the Spirit Tree Forest.
Suddenly, monsters set fire to her village and Foresia is captured and enslaved. With the help of the spirit, she manages to escape but is plagued by a curse she cannot resist.
In order to break free from her unjust situation, Foresia travels to the village of Crossleven, accepting quests from the guild, gathering information, honing her skills, and seeking the truth...

GAME PLAY

This game is an action game with a simple "automatic aiming" feature.
In the action part, the screen displays a top-down diagonal view. Move Foresia skillfully to achieve victory.
Use "bow and arrow," "homing magic," and "ultimate magic" to attack.
Use "shield magic" to defend.

data.short_description: Foresia is a rare High Elf living in the Spirit Tree Forest. Suddenly, monsters set fire to her village and Foresia is captured and enslaved. With the help of the spirit, she manages to escape but is plagued by a curse she cannot resist.
data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 10/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: 10
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
